top_signals.title: After FCAS demise, Germany’s options include ordering more F-35 warplanes
top_signals.summary: “Knowing what we know today, we wouldn’t set up a program in this way again,” Pistorius said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan-Led Group to Sell Qualtrics Hung Debt at Year End
top_signals.summary: A group of banks led by JPMorgan Chase & Co. is planning to offload about $5.3 billion in financing for software firm Qualtrics International Inc. later this year in a bid to shift the hung debt off their books.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US launches new strikes on Iran after helicopter downed
top_signals.summary: The U.S. launched strikes against Iran on Tuesday after Trump said Tehran had shot down a U.S. Apache helicopter in the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Meta agrees to Indian AI data center deal as hyperscaler bolsters its infrastructure
top_signals.summary: Meta signs a deal with Mukesh Ambani's Reliance Industries to lease an AI-enabled data center in India.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Guidance: AI Adoption Insights agreement
top_signals.summary: The AI Adoption Insights agreement was agreed as a part of the AI Adoption Summit, held on 8 June 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Anthropic leans into AI’s nascent slice-and-dice era
top_signals.summary: Clever financial engineering is allowing conservative, risk-averse investors to participate enthusiastically
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Belfast braced for more racially motivated riots after families evacuated
top_signals.summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer appeals for calm and vows that those responsible will be punished
